results.sql: SELECT `School Name`, CAST(MAX(`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)`) AS REAL) / MAX(`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) AS `eligible_free_rate_aged_5_17` FROM frpm WHERE `Educational Option Type` = 'Continuation School' GROUP BY `CDSCode`, `School Name` HAVING MAX(`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > 0 AND MAX(`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)`) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY `eligible_free_rate_aged_5_17` ASC LIMIT 3
